title: Pipelayers
description: Lay pipe for storm or sanitation sewers, drains, and water mains. Perform any combination of the following tasks: grade trenches or culverts, position pipe, or seal joints.

tasks.text: Grade or level trench bases, using tamping machines or hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dig trenches to desired or required depths, by hand or using trenching tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install or use instruments such as lasers, grade rods, or transit levels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cover pipes with earth or other materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect pipe pieces and seal joints, using welding equipment, cement, or glue.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install or repair sanitary or stormwater sewer structures or pipe systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check slopes for conformance to requirements, using levels or lasers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Align and position pipes to prepare them for welding or sealing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lay out pipe routes, following written instructions or blueprints and coordinating layouts with supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tap and drill holes into pipes to introduce auxiliary lines or devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate mechanized equipment, such as pickup trucks, rollers, tandem dump trucks, front-end loaders, or backhoes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train or supervise others in laying pipe.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Locate existing pipes needing repair or replacement, using magnetic or radio indicators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
